agent.status: Another round of report-review fixes: a skipped week (too few players) now shows the current week in yellow with the reason instead of jumping ahead; the 'game on' email no longer offers 'play after all' to people already in; the account page's donation panel moved to the far right; and the test report stopped repeating the confirm-email step in every test.
agent.direction: Full test run to confirm green, then pushing up for review.
